paragraph-a-society-cannot-measure-moral.easy: You cannot say society is getting worse unless you know what good means.
paragraph-a-society-cannot-measure-moral.academic: A claim of moral decline presupposes a prior normative standard by which decline can be measured.
paragraph-a-society-cannot-measure-moral.math_translation: decline = current moral state - moral-health baseline

commentary.label: Core idea
commentary.value: Moral decline requires a reference standard.
